_meta._comment: Sidecar descriptions for research files. The build-time script (scripts/generate-research-files.js) walks /public/files/ and /public/images/ and matches each file against entries here for its description. Files not listed get a generic auto-generated description. Paths are relative to /public/.
_meta._format: key = relative path (without leading slash), value = human-readable description

images/design_approaches.png: Three wildly different design approaches: Brutalist Industrial, Organic Minimalism, Cyberpunk Dashboard
images/decision_tree.png: Decision tree for choosing the right proxy architecture and design approach
images/architecture_diagram.png: System architecture diagram showing the three-tier error defense system
images/perspectives-tab.png: Five animal-metaphor perspectives on error handling and resilience
images/error-handler-tab.png: Pre-flight deployment checker and error handler interface design
images/proxy-topics-page.png: Proxy types comparison and discussion page visualization
files/Impeccable_Error_Fix_Handler_Audit: Comprehensive audit report with 5 animal-metaphor perspectives (Owl, Eagle, Beaver, Dolphin, Elephant)
files/Portfolio_Website_Recreation_SOP_f: 33-page SOP for recreating the portfolio with 3 design approaches, confidence scoring, decision trees, YC/staff-engineer reviews
files/Portfolio_Website_Recreation_SOP.p: Earlier draft of the SOP — included for version comparison and historical reference
files/cover_portfolio_sop.pdf: Standalone cover page for the Portfolio Website Recreation SOP document
files/cover_portfolio_sop.html: HTML version of the SOP cover page — viewable inline in the browser
files/generate_portfolio_sop.py: Python script generating the SOP PDF with custom ReportLab styles, flowables, and table builders
files/generate_audit.py: Python script generating the Error Fix Handler Audit PDF with cascade palette
files/gen_architecture.py: Python script generating the system architecture diagram visualization
files/generate_decision_tree.py: Python script generating the decision tree visualization for proxy and design approach selection
files/README.md: Project README — live deployment links, tech stack, project structure, design philosophy
files/impeccable-error-handler/README.md: Documentation for the three-tier error defense system: Prevention, Detection, Recovery
files/impeccable-error-handler/deploy.sh: Main deployment script with pre-flight checks, session checkpointing, and failover logic
files/impeccable-error-handler/git-recov: Git state recovery script for handling rebase locks, merge conflicts, and index corruption
